title: TEDxDOC1 | MBA IB DSE
paragraphs: A TEDx event is a local gathering where live TED-like talks and performances are shared with the community. TEDx events are fully planned and coordinated independently, on a community-by-community basis. The content and design of each TEDx event is unique and developed independently. A suite of short, carefully prepared talks, demonstrations and performances that are idea-focused, and cover a wide range of subjects to foster learning, inspiration and wonder – and provoke conversations that matter.

All TEDx events present multiple issues and a diversity of voices from many disciplines. A TEDx event is organized by volunteers from the local community, and just like TED events, it lacks any commercial, religious or political agenda. Its goal is to spark conversation, connection and community.
“Carve your name on hearts, not tombstones. A legacy is etched into the minds of others and the stories they share about you”

It is the inaugural virtual TEDx event of Department of Commerce, Delhi School of Economics, University of Delhi. Organised by the oldest committee of Department of Commerce Team Convention. With a mission of ‘Spreading Ideas’ we gathered people of varied discipline and culture to acknowledge us and the world with what “legacy” is to them.

We believe passionately in power of ideas to change the attitude, lives and ultimately the world. The event was commenced by Prof. RK Singh, Head Department of Commerce and Dean Faculty of Commerce and Business. He humbly welcomed all the speakers and acknowledged Team Convention for organising the event. He stimulated the start of the event by his thoughts about how there is not
“The way of success” but “A way of Success".

Founding partner of Huddle, a leading incubator in Delhi, co–owner of the global sports brand Tru. He is a national best- selling author and the co-producer of New York Festival Award winning Bollywood movie, Mantra.
CEO of Ekaya, her aim is developing a cultural initiative for the admirers of handloom work and extends it for those who want to discover it.
An internationally acclaimed cyber lawyer and expert of IT laws and currently practicing in Supreme Court of India. She is the founding partner of Seth Associates.
A renowned Indian fashion and beauty blogger, she proudly holds the ‘Best fashion influencer of 2018’ award and News x Women Achievers award 2019 to her credit.

Mr. Malik served in Indian army for 38 years and has an experience of over 5 years in corporate sector. Some significant assignments held by him include Director Eurasia Division, Ministry of External Affairs.
An incredible RJ honoured with LIMCA BOOK OF RECORDS for continuously hosting a radio show for 105 hours. He held the position of best RJ in 2015, 2015, 2016, 2017 and 2019.
To play, press and hold the enter key. To stop, release the enter key.
Lakshita Uppal Gmail: lakshita.u21@mibdu.org Phone No: +91 98214 49106
